Bey Herrn Haag dem Buchbinder in der Augustiner-Ga√ü sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ludwig Gottfrieds</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Beschreibung von Schweden</TITLE>, mit viel sch√∂nen Kupferen, <PLACE>Franckfurt</PLACE> <YEAR>1632</YEAR>. <FORMAT>fol</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Rollin</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Histoire Romaine</TITLE> <VOLUME>11. Tomes</VOLUME>, <PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE> <YEAR>1744</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Lightfooti</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Hori Hebr. in 4. Evang.</TITLE> <PLACE>Lipf.</PLACE> <YEAR>1684</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Hora Hebr. in Act. Rom. Cor.</TITLE> <PLACE>Amst.</PLACE> <YEAR>1679</YEAR></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Stollens</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Anleit. zur Historie der Gelehrtheit</TITLE>, <PLACE>Jenä</PLACE> <YEAR>1727</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Walchn</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Hist. Critica Ling. Lat.</TITLE> <PLACE>Lipf.</PLACE> <YEAR>1729</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Clericus</AUTHOR> <TITLE>in Pentateuch. & Libr. Hist. v. Test.</TITLE> <PLACE>Tubing.</PLACE> <YEAR>1733</YEAR>. <VOLUME>11. Tomi</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Ein Frantzösischer Atlas</TITLE> von <VOLUME>50. Carten</VOLUME></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":10,"explanation":"The following corrections were made:
1. VOLUME "IT. Tomes" → "11. Tomes": OCR misread "11" as "IT" (Roman numeral / digit confusion).
2. FORMAT "8v6" → "8vo": OCR misread the letter "o" as "6", corrected to standard bibliographic format "8vo".
3. TITLE "hori Hebr." → "Hori Hebr.": Capitalized the first letter of the title for consistency.
4. AUTHOR "Eyusd." → "Ejusd.": OCR misread "j" as "y"; "Ejusdem" (Latin for "of the same") is the correct abbreviation.
5. TITLE "hora Hebr." → "Hora Hebr.": Capitalized the first letter of the title.
6. TITLE "in fct. Rom. Cor." → "in Act. Rom. Cor.": OCR misread "Act." (Acts) as "fct.", corrected to the standard biblical abbreviation.
7. PLACE "Jenä" (encoded as "Jen√§"): Corrected the garbled Unicode encoding to proper "Jenä" (Jena with umlaut).
8. FORMAT "4t√≤" → "4to": OCR/encoding error in the format field, corrected to standard "4to".
9. TITLE tag malformed: `<TITLE=in Pentateuch...>` had a stray `=` sign — corrected to a proper `<TITLE>` opening tag.
10. Ampersand `&` in TITLE "in Pentateuch. & Libr. Hist. v. Test.": The raw `&` was escaped to `&` to produce valid XML."}

parsed.explanation:
The following corrections were made:
1. VOLUME "IT. Tomes" → "11. Tomes": OCR misread "11" as "IT" (Roman numeral / digit confusion).
2. FORMAT "8v6" → "8vo": OCR misread the letter "o" as "6", corrected to standard bibliographic format "8vo".
3. TITLE "hori Hebr." → "Hori Hebr.": Capitalized the first letter of the title for consistency.
4. AUTHOR "Eyusd." → "Ejusd.": OCR misread "j" as "y"; "Ejusdem" (Latin for "of the same") is the correct abbreviation.
5. TITLE "hora Hebr." → "Hora Hebr.": Capitalized the first letter of the title.
6. TITLE "in fct. Rom. Cor." → "in Act. Rom. Cor.": OCR misread "Act." (Acts) as "fct.", corrected to the standard biblical abbreviation.
7. PLACE "Jenä" (encoded as "Jen√§"): Corrected the garbled Unicode encoding to proper "Jenä" (Jena with umlaut).
8. FORMAT "4t√≤" → "4to": OCR/encoding error in the format field, corrected to standard "4to".
9. TITLE tag malformed: `<TITLE=in Pentateuch...>` had a stray `=` sign — corrected to a proper `<TITLE>` opening tag.
10. Ampersand `&` in TITLE "in Pentateuch. & Libr. Hist. v. Test.": The raw `&` was escaped to `&` to produce valid XML.
